{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211752337C138ACDDD159DA9BF38"}"},"total":23},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7605934732499157785","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书非常精彩！和普通套路网文不一样的是这本书像纪录片一样的真实，它将过去岁月里那些发生的点点滴滴，事无巨细地写出来。将那个老去的江湖讲述得淋漓尽致。那些真实的事件，在笔者的讲述下，娓娓道来，一个个生动鲜明的人物跃然眼前，那些引人入胜的故事，惊心动魄。
这是一个真实的江湖，这是一段真实的回忆。感谢作者给我们带来这个精彩而丰富的故事。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770897864,"group_id":"7592100749027331134","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"职业网文写手，已有多部作品发布。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6c5QiktsYhrc6T8UIx4mtcdp+EaEt42mKtO/jqiKOUL","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c64c3797c9724448a7529f1d945f474c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621745&x-signature=gjwvAYlSkSff64Ye3b7kLseFpJM%3D","user_id":"3227811966896936","user_name":"刘尔谋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3227811966896936","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7592100749027331134","book_info":{"abstract":"成都过往的江湖，鱼龙混杂，风起云涌，以“遂宁帮”为代表，和成都周边的各帮派发生冲突。
作品江湖习气浓，里面不但有儿女情长，也有斗智斗勇，险像环生，真实体现了八九十年代成都江湖的风风雨雨，值得一看。
